{{Infobox group
| name = Legion
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Legion]] has gathered five [[Hives]] in the [[Ynthra system]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Iron King]] is connected to the [[Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Legion]] is a group controlled by an [[Iron King]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Legion]] is still around despite the [[Iron King]] being gone.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
